title: How to only send certain meetings from Calendly to Monday?
excerpt: With the Calendly integration, it looks like any time anyone makes an appointment for any type of meeting, the item is sent to Monday.com. However, I only need this to occur when certain meetings are established in Calen…

posts.author: limagoose (Lisa)
posts.cookedHtml: With the Calendly integration, it looks like any time anyone makes an appointment for any type of meeting, the item is sent to Monday.com. However, I only need this to occur when certain meetings are established in Calendly. How do I customize this?
